title: Developing a Chatbot Conversation Flow
scenario: A company wants to create a chatbot to help customers with common questions. Write a prompt that generates a simple conversation flow for the chatbot using a flowchart or state machine.
constraints: Must include a flowchart or state machine
Must include a list of intents
Must include a list of responses

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the conversation flow meet all the specified constraints?
Is the conversation flow logical and intuitive?
Is the conversation flow visually appealing and easy to follow?
